data.title: Adobe CEO decides to transition out of role
data.description: Shantanu Narayen has served as the Adobe CEO for 18 years. He said will remain chair of the board and help the directors select a suitable successor.

data.title: Online retailers lead February declines in Ecommerce Stock Index
data.description: VTEX and Etsy outperformed during a difficult month in the Ecommerce Stock Index, as Xometry and Wayfair saw share prices fall.

data.title: Petco builds around "integrated omnichannel" experiences
data.description: The pet-focused retailer's sales decreased year over year in its fiscal Q4 and in 2025 overall. As it seeks to rebound, it's focusing on further integrating its ecommerce business with its physical stores.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Who are the top online retailers in Health & Beauty?
data.description: Hims & Hers entered the top five in the Health & Beauty category in 2025 among online retailers rankers by annual web sales.

data.title: Levi Strauss picks SCAYLE as global ecommerce platform provider
data.description: SCAYLE was originally developed by European online fashion retailer Zalando to support its own large-scale digital commerce operations before being commercialized as a standalone platform used by global brands and retailers.
